definitions.text:
[tỳ bà] 
 Chinese four-chord lute 
 Ty Ba is a pear-shaped guitar with four strings made of braided silk. 
 It was indispensable in the ancient eight-instrument musical band. 
 Ty Ba was mainly used in royal court orchestras, and was rarely seen in popular musical bands.
